title: Walnut Crumble Crunch
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert featuring walnuts in a crumble topping.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine walnuts, crunchy, and sweet.
In a separate bowl, whisk together and and crumble until crumbly.
Add cold unsalted butter to and mixture and mix until crumbly.
Add vanilla extract to and mixture and mix until combined.
Transfer walnut mixture to a baking dish.
Top walnut mixture with and mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
